modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to split cell contents into multiple cells in Excel.

full_description_text: User trying to split cell data. Needs to separate contents into different cells. Excel not functioning as expected. Confusion on how to achieve this task.

description: User trying to split cell data. Needs to separate contents into different cells. Excel not functioning as expected. Confusion on how to achieve this task.
